Types

TomlNodeKind = enum
  tomlArray,                ## array
  tomlDocument,             ## document
  tomlDottedKey,            ## dotted_key
  tomlFloat,                ## float
  tomlInlineTable,          ## inline_table
  tomlInteger,              ## integer
  tomlPair,                 ## pair
  tomlQuotedKey,            ## quoted_key
  tomlString,               ## string
  tomlTable,                ## table
  tomlTableArrayElement,    ## table_array_element
  tomlQuoteTok,             ## "
  tomlTripleQuoteTok,       ## """
  tomlApostropheTok,        ## '
  tomlTripleApostropheTok,  ## '''
  tomlCommaTok,             ## ,
  tomlDotTok,               ## .
  tomlEqualTok,             ## =
  tomlLBrackTok,            ## [
  tomlDoubleLBrackTok,      ## [[
  tomlRBrackTok,            ## ]
  tomlDoubleRBrackTok,      ## ]]
  tomlBareKey,              ## bare_key
  tomlBoolean,              ## boolean
  tomlComment,              ## comment
  tomlEscapeSequence,       ## escape_sequence
  tomlLocalDate,            ## local_date
  tomlLocalDateTime,        ## local_date_time
  tomlLocalTime,            ## local_time
  tomlOffsetDateTime,       ## offset_date_time
  tomlLCurlyTok,            ## {
  tomlRCurlyTok,            ## }
  tomlSyntaxError            ## Tree-sitter parser syntax error
TomlExternalTok = enum
  tomlExtern_line_ending_or_eof, ## _line_ending_or_eof
  tomlExtern_multiline_basic_string_content, ## _multiline_basic_string_content
  tomlExtern_multiline_basic_string_end, ## _multiline_basic_string_end
  tomlExtern_multiline_literal_string_content, ## _multiline_literal_string_content
  tomlExtern_multiline_literal_string_end ## _multiline_literal_string_end
TomlNode = distinct TSNode
TomlParser = distinct PtsParser

Procs

proc kind(node: TomlNode): TomlNodeKind {...}{.noSideEffect, raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect].}
proc tsNodeType(node: TomlNode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc newTomlParser(): TomlParser {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc parseString(parser: TomlParser; str: string): TomlNode {...}{.raises: [],
    tags: [].}
proc parseTomlString(str: string): TomlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc isNil(node: TomlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
proc treeRepr(mainNode: TomlNode; instr: string; withUnnamed: bool = false): string {...}{.
    raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect].}

Funcs

func `[]`(node: TomlNode; idx: int; withUnnamed: bool = false): TomlNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
func len(node: TomlNode; withUnnamed: bool = false): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func slice(node: TomlNode): Slice[int] {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func nodeString(node: TomlNode): string {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isNull(node: TomlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isNamed(node: TomlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isMissing(node: TomlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func isExtra(node: TomlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func hasChanges(node: TomlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func hasError(node: TomlNode): bool {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func parent(node: TomlNode): TomlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func child(node: TomlNode; a2: int): TomlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func childCount(node: TomlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func namedChild(node: TomlNode; a2: int): TomlNode {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func namedChildCount(node: TomlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func startPoint(node: TomlNode): TSPoint {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func endPoint(node: TomlNode): TSPoint {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func startLine(node: TomlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func endLine(node: TomlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func startColumn(node: TomlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func endColumn(node: TomlNode): int {...}{.raises: [], tags: [].}
func childByFieldName(self: TomlNode; fieldName: string; fieldNameLength: int): TSNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}

Iterators

iterator items(node: TomlNode; withUnnamed: bool = false): TomlNode {...}{.
    raises: [], tags: [].}
